TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Switzerland Itini i 47 00 N, 8 00 E, noYoropi ko Switzerland. Polong no sekalay i 41,277 sq km "saka 136 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 39,997 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 1,280 sq km " Polong i 8,179,294 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 38.70%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 31.50%, malo no roma to a sera 29.80%. siyoto O ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakafalo 1 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Didier Burkhalter, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 1 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

" "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, **,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i *,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakafa…ĺo~u * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i …¨~…ģi…¨~…ģi…ôr b~b~vo~u~urkńßa…ĺt…ôr, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Switzerland Itini i 47 00 N, 8 00 E, noYoropi ko Switzerland. Polong no sekalay i 41,277 sq km "saka 136 ko rayray no ngangan. " "O sekalay no sera i, 39,997 sq km, no nanom a sekalay i, 1,280 sq km " Polong i 8,179,294 ko tamdaw. sera Masakilac ko sera o malo kakaomahen a sera 38.70%, Malo no kilakilangan a sera 31.50%, malo no roma to a sera 29.80%. siyoto O ko Siyoto. katomirengan no kitakit a romi'ad Pihiratengan no kitakit a romi'ad i sakafalo 1 a romi'ad. O Sawara'an no kitakit anini i ci Didier Burkhalter, patirengan a romi'ad i 2012 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 1 a romi'ad. Pi'arawan to lakaw CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®

" "o~u s…ôka…ĺaj no~u s…ôra i, **,*** s* km, no~u nano~um a s…ôka…ĺaj i, *,*** s* km " po~u…ĺo~uŇč i *,***,*** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. s…ôra masaki…ĺa ¶ ko~u s…ôra o~u ma…ĺo~u kakao~umańß…ôn a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ki…ĺaki…ĺaŇčan a s…ôra **.**%, ma…ĺo~u no~u ro~uma to~u a s…ôra **.**%. sijo~uto~u o~u ko~u sijo~uto~u. kato~umir…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ pińßirat…ôŇčan no~u kitakit a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i sakafa…ĺo~u * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit anini i ¶i …¨~…ģi…¨~…ģi…ôr b~b~vo~u~urkńßa…ĺt…ôr, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. pi °arawan to~u …ĺakaw ¶ia ***
